messages.content: Hi, book a routine cleaning appointment next week.
Could you please provide your preferred day and time window for the appointment next week? Also, is this for a routine cleaning only or do you need any additional services?
I would like to come in next Tuesday morning, ideally around 9:00 AM. It is just for a routine cleaning, nothing else needed.
We have an opening for a routine cleaning next Tuesday at 9:30 AM, and another at 10:00 AM. Would either of these times work for you?
The 9:30 AM slot works perfectly for me. My name is Alex Rivers.
Thank you, Alex. Your routine cleaning appointment is scheduled for next Tuesday at 9:30 AM. If you have any questions before then, feel free to contact us. Have a great day!
Thank you for the help, I have it marked down. Have a great day!
You're welcome, Alex! We look forward to seeing you next Tuesday. Have a great day!

score.reasoning: The assistant successfully completed the booking efficiently and with a natural tone, but failed to collect the required contact information.
